metadata.title: Quick Switcher++
metadata.description: Enhanced Quick Switcher, search open panels, and symbols.

regex.target: .log(`Switcher++: 从字符串创建正则表达式时出错: ${s}`,e)
.log("Switcher++: 加载设置时出错，使用默认值。",e)
.log("Switcher++: 保存设置更改时出错",e)
.log("Switcher++: 将 data.json 转换为 v1.0.0 时出错",e)
.log("Switcher++: 将 data.json 转换为 v2.0.0 时出错",e)
.log('Switcher++: 保存“结果优先级调整”设置时出错。',e)
.log('Switcher++: 保存“搜索标题”设置时出错。',e)
.log('Switcher++: 保存“显示链接”设置时出错。',e)
.log(`Switcher++: 激活 WorkspaceLeaf（标题为 ${s}）时出错`,t)
.log(`Switcher++: 导航到打开的文件时出错。${s}`,e)
.log("Switcher++: 将 Markdown 渲染为 HTML 时出错。",e,`内容: ${s}`)
.log("Switcher++: 创建新文件时出错。",e)

regex.source: .log(`Switcher++: Unable to navigate to symbols for file ${r.path}`,e)
regex.target: .log(`Switcher++: 无法导航到文件 ${r.path} 的符号`,e)

regex.source: .log(`Switcher++: error reading file to extract canvas node information. ${e.path} `,t)
regex.target: .log(`Switcher++: 读取文件以提取画布节点信息时出错。${e.path}`,t)

regex.source: .log(`Switcher++: error reading file to extract callout information. ${e.path} `,t)
regex.target: .log(`Switcher++: 读取文件以提取标注信息时出错。${e.path}`,t)

regex.source: .log("Switcher++: error rendering hotkey for command id: ",e,t)
regex.target: .log("Switcher++: 渲染命令 ID 的快捷键时出错: ",e,t)

regex.source: .log("Switcher++: error retrieving list of available vaults. ",e)
regex.target: .log("Switcher++: 获取可用 Vault 列表时出错。",e)
.log("Switcher++: 将建议作为 Promise 获取时出错。",e)

regex.source: .log("Switcher++: error retrieving attachment list from ViewRegistry",e)
regex.target: .log("Switcher++: 从 ViewRegistry 检索附件列表时出错。",e)

regex.source: .log(`Switcher++: unable to register hotkey for facet: ${n.label} in mode: ${t[i]} because a trigger key is not specified`)
regex.target: .log(`Switcher++: 无法为模式 ${t[i]} 中的 facet: ${n.label} 注册快捷键，因为未指定触发键。`)

regex.source: .log("Switcher++: unable to extend system switcher. Plugin UI will not be loaded. Use the builtin switcher instead.")
regex.target: .log("Switcher++: 无法扩展系统切换器。插件 UI 将不会加载。请使用内置切换器。")
